title: Dungeons Hotbar
description: Changes hotbar to be like in Minecraft: Dungeons.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dafb404bc096c9f31b60f851f41d3c8d56dce473_0.webp)
###### Image by K1Ms17

### Pack

This pack changes hotbar to be like from Minecraft: Dungeons.

### Compatibility
Pack may be incompatible with mods like Optifine, Iris or Sodium but probably should work fine.

### Bugs
Pack may have bugs with text(text in menu may change position on some elevations), gui items (if they are bigger than standard slot) and overlay squares(like FPS/TPS diagrams). These bugs are unfixable cause of not ideal system of separating GUI objects.

### Credits
Applied [Minecraft Ten](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mc10) font pack made by [xllifi](https://modrinth.com/user/xllifi) ([CC-BY 4.0 License](https://www.tldrlegal.com/license/creative-commons-attribution-4-0-international-cc-by-4)).
